---
title: "A | Thema 1"
format: live-html
engine: knitr  
status: "Version 0.1"
lang: de 
---

{{< include _extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
 
##  

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false

webr::install("quadprog",  repos = "https://kroehne.github.io/webr-quadprog-repo")
 
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(mnormt))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaan))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(lavaanPlot))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(DT))

assignInNamespace("lav_options_checkinterval", function(x, nm, num2int) {
    if (any(is.na(x))) return(TRUE)
    if (num2int) x <- as.integer(x)                                                                                              
    oks <- vapply(x, function(x1) {
      (x1 > nm$bounds[1] || (x1 == nm$bounds[1] && nm$first.in)) &&                                                              
      (x1 < nm$bounds[2] || (x1 == nm$bounds[2] && nm$last.in))                                                                  
    }, TRUE)
    all(oks)                                                                                                                     
  }, ns = "lavaan")

model_3f <-  "visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
              textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
              speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9"

fit_3f <- cfa(model_3f, data = HolzingerSwineford1939)


View <- function(dat){
  dat_name <- deparse(substitute(dat))
  df_display <- dat |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "❌ (NA)", .x))
  )
  
  DT::datatable(
    df_display,
    rownames = FALSE, 
    options = list(
      pageLength = 5,
      scrollX = TRUE,
      dom = 'tip',   
      columnDefs = list(list(className = 'dt-center', targets = "_all"))
    ),
    caption = htmltools::tags$caption(
      style = 'caption-side: top; text-align: left;',
      'data.frame: ', htmltools::strong(dat_name)
    )
  )  
}
```

### Präsentation

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
# ==============================================================
# Thema 01: Konfirmatorische Faktorenanalyse und Modellvergleich
# Datensatz: HolzingerSwineford1939 (lavaan, N=301)
# ==============================================================

library(lavaan)
library(lavaanPlot)

data(HolzingerSwineford1939)
dat <- HolzingerSwineford1939

# ---- PRÄSENTATION: 3-Faktor-CFA ----

model_3f <- '
  visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
  speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9
'

fit_3f <- cfa(model_3f, data = dat)
summary(fit_3f, fit.measures = TRUE, standardized = TRUE)

# Pfaddiagramm
lavaanPlot(model = fit_3f,   
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE)

# Fit-Indizes einzeln
fitMeasures(fit_3f, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "tli",
    "rmsea", "rmsea.ci.lower", "rmsea.ci.upper", "srmr"))

# Standardisierte Lösung
standardizedSolution(fit_3f)

# Faktorinterkorrelationen
lavInspect(fit_3f, "cor.lv")

```

## Bericht

```{webr}
#| warning: false
#| echo: true
library(lavaan)
library(lavaanPlot)

data(HolzingerSwineford1939)
dat <- HolzingerSwineford1939

# ---- BERICHT: Modellvergleich (4 Modelle) ----

# Modell a: 1-Faktor (g)
model_1f <- '
  g =~ x1 + x2 + x3 + x4 + x5 + x6 + x7 + x8 + x9
'
fit_1f <- cfa(model_1f, data = dat)

# Modell b: 3 korrelierte Faktoren (= Präsentationsmodell)
# fit_3f bereits geschätzt

# Modell c: 3 unkorrelierte (orthogonale) Faktoren
model_3f_orth <- '
  visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
  speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9
'
fit_3f_orth <- cfa(model_3f_orth, data = dat, orthogonal = TRUE)

# Modell d: Hierarchisches Modell (g-Faktor 2. Ordnung)
model_hier <- '
  visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
  speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9
  g       =~ visual + textual + speed
'
fit_hier <- cfa(model_hier, data = dat)


# Pfaddiagramm
lavaanPlot(model = fit_hier,   
     coefs = TRUE, stand = TRUE,covs = TRUE)

# Vergleichstabelle
fits <- list("1-Faktor" = fit_1f,
             "3 Faktoren (korreliert)" = fit_3f,
             "3 Faktoren (orthogonal)" = fit_3f_orth,
             "Hierarchisch (g)" = fit_hier)

fit_table <- sapply(fits, function(f) {
  fitMeasures(f, c("chisq", "df", "pvalue", "cfi", "tli",
                    "rmsea", "srmr", "aic", "bic"))
})
round(t(fit_table), 3)

# Chi-Quadrat-Differenztest: 1-Faktor vs. 3-Faktor
anova(fit_1f, fit_3f)

# Hierarchisch vs. 3-Faktor (gleiche df → identischer Fit bei 3 Faktoren)
anova(fit_hier, fit_3f)
```
